title: Heartless's Arsenal
description: When the only way to win is to give in.
body:
[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/31eFAjx.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1190)


In this mod you will find weaponry created from things you never expected!

**Items:**

- Blood Bath Blade - a sword that when right clicked summons blood bath blots to help you fight!
- Blood bath scythe - a throwabe weapon! make sure to go pick it up though!
- 
- and its counterparts
- 
- Holy Blood blade - a blade that when right clicked on an entity they summon an explosive to blow up your enemies!
- 
- Holy Blood scythe - a scythe thats throwable! make sure you do go pick it up this time!

**Blocks:**

- blood bath pedastal - place any item on it to display it inside your base!
- 
- Heartless industries crate box! - it does nothing except looks really satisfying on your walls.
- 
- onyx stone - smelted blackstone that looks pretty cool!
- 
- blood bath lantern! - a fancy light!
- 
- also thigh highs that dont really do anything apart from make u look rlly silly!

CREDIT:

model and texture for Warturtle by Artkek (discord: artkek)



[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/31eFAjx.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1190)
